Name: UMenuAnchor
Description:
The Menu Anchor allows you to specify an location that a popup menu should be anchored to, 
  and should be summoned from.
   Single Child
   Popup

Variables.Name: MenuClass
Variables.Description:
The widget class to spawn when the menu is required.  Creates the widget freshly each time.  
	  If you want to customize the creation of the popup, you should bind a function to OnGetMenuContentEvent 
	  instead.

Variables.Name: OnGetMenuContentEvent
Variables.Description: Called when the menu content is requested to allow a more customized handling over what to display

Variables.Name: Placement
Variables.Description: The placement location of the summoned widget.

Variables.Name: UseApplicationMenuStack
Variables.Description: Does this menu behave like a normal stacked menu? Set it to false to control the menu's lifetime yourself.

Params.Name: bFocusOnOpen
Params.Description: Should we focus the popup as soon as it opens?

Functions.Name: Open
Functions.Description: Opens the menu if it is not already open

Functions.Name: Close
Functions.Description: Closes the menu if it is currently open.

Return.Description: true if the popup is open; false otherwise.
true if we should open the menu due to a click. Sometimes we should not, if
Whether this menu has open submenus

Delegate.Name: OnMenuOpenChanged
Delegate.Description: Called when the opened state of the menu changes
